name: OneMain Financial
description_short: 7676 Belair Rd in Baltimore, MD is home to OneMain Financial, offering personal loans with weekday service.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is located at 7676 Belair Rd in Baltimore, MD, a standalone personal loan office. This Baltimore branch operates Mon-Fri from 9AM-5:30PM and is closed on weekends. The location serves Baltimore residents seeking in-person loan consultations and applications.

This Baltimore office specializes in personal loans ranging from $100 to $10,000, with flexible terms and quick processing. You can reach the team at +1 410-882-9640 to discuss your loan needs, check rates, or schedule an appointment. Services include debt consolidation, home improvement financing, and emergency personal loans.

Bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and bank statements when visiting the 7676 Belair Rd location in Baltimore, MD. OneMain Financial offers a straightforward lending process designed to get you approved quickly without the bureaucracy of larger banks.
pros: Loan amounts from $1,500–$30,000 accessible to borrowers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans
Fixed interest rates and fixed monthly payments with no prepayment penalties, ensuring payment transparency
Potential same-day or next-day funding via SpeedFunds within 1 hour of closing with eligible debit card
Multiple application channels: online, phone, or in-branch with local loan specialists available
After-hours appointments now available to accommodate working customers' schedules
Flexible loan terms from 24–60 months, allowing customization to borrower budgets
Wide range of loan purposes (15+ categories including debt consolidation, auto, medical, home improvement, wedding)
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is broad; most borrowers likely to receive rates in the 25–36% range typical of subprime lending
Loan cap of $30,000 is insufficient for major debt consolidation or home equity needs
Fixed rates up to 35.99% APR are substantially higher than traditional bank personal loans (typically 6–15%)
In-person closing still required for funding; SpeedFunds requires eligible bank-issued debit card
Weekday-only branch hours (closed Saturday/Sunday) may be inconvenient for some customers
best_for: Borrowers with fair or poor credit seeking debt consolidation with fixed, predictable monthly payments
Consumers needing quick access to $1,500–$30,000 for emergency expenses, medical bills, or home/auto repairs
Customers without access to traditional bank loans who value transparent terms and no prepayment penalties
Individuals prioritizing in-person consultation with loan specialists over fully digital lending platforms
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best suited for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit who need $1,500–$30,000 quickly and value transparent fixed-rate terms and personal service. The main caveat is that advertised rates start at 11.99% APR but most applicants will receive rates in the 25–36% range, and loan amounts max at $30,000, making them unsuitable for larger consolidation needs or borrowers who can qualify for traditional bank loans (typically 6–15% APR).
services: Online, phone, and in-branch application channels
meta_description: OneMain Financial at 7676 Belair Rd, Baltimore, MD. Personal loans up to $10,000 with same-day decisions.
